title: Possible infinite loop in output evaluation

features.name: cmos transistor network with feedback loop causing simulation hang
features.description: Code should include a CMOS transistor network using tranif0 and tranif1 instances where source-drain connections form a feedback loop, with supply1/supply0 as power rails, that causes non-terminating evaluation when driven by a specific input sequence

features.name: interconnected tranif0 tranif1 instances with shared control wires
features.description: Code should include multiple tranif0 and tranif1 transistor instances that share control wires (gate signals) and interconnect their source-drain terminals in a chain pattern that creates a latch-like feedback structure
